description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring three horizontal wooden slats for the backrest and three for the seat, all supported by robust metal brackets. The bench is mounted on a thick, rectangular concrete base, which provides stability and prevents movement. The wood appears weathered and dark-stained, suitable for withstanding outdoor conditions, while the metal supports are simple and utilitarian. A small plaque is affixed to the upper backrest slat, possibly for dedication or informational purposes. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no armrests and a focus on durability. The bench is ideal for public parks, sidewalks, or other urban outdoor settings.
description: A heavy-duty outdoor bench with dark wooden slats, metal supports, and a solid concrete base, designed for public use. It features a backrest and a small plaque, with a minimalist, armrest-free design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wooden backrest slats, seat slats, metal supports, and a small plaque on the top slat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the concrete base, the alignment of the wooden slats, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and metal supports, with the concrete base fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bench and the structure of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: metal supports anchored into concrete base
